api_token.description: MailerSend API token. Used only for Bearer auth; never logged.

base_url.description: MailerSend API base URL override for tests or proxies.

domain_id.description: MailerSend domain id. Required by the activity stream (path-scoped); optionally filters the messages stream when set.

date_from.description: Unix-seconds lower bound for the activity stream's required date window. Falls back to start_date when unset.

date_to.description: Unix-seconds upper bound for the activity stream's required date window.

start_date.description: Fallback for date_from when date_from itself is unset (activity stream only).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
